feed.title: Corpus Linguistics and Linguistic Theory
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Corpus Linguistics and Linguistic Theory (De Gruyter)

entry.title: BERT-assisted behavioral profiling of polysemy: contrastive analysis of HONG in Chinese and RED in English
entry.summary: Authors: Yiming Song, Deliang Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cllt-2024-0029 Pages: Page range: 255-291

entry.title: Refining the network for the Chinese analytic causative constructicon: insights from corpus analysis and psycholinguistic experimentation
entry.summary: Authors: Xiaoyu Tian DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cllt-2024-0071 Pages: Page range: 293-325

entry.title: Lexical factors in English definiteness marking: a corpus-based investigation
entry.summary: Authors: Florent Perek, Lotte Sommerer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cllt-2024-0032 Pages: Page range: 327-361

entry.title: A multivariate corpus analysis of locative inversion in Mandarin Chinese
entry.summary: Authors: Yuting Li DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cllt-2024-0060 Pages: Page range: 363-412

entry.title: Semantic and contextual constraints on the causative alternation in English: a multifactorial analysis
entry.summary: Authors: Jiyoun Kim, Hanjung Lee, Ye-eun Cho DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cllt-2024-0047 Pages: Page range: 413-460

entry.title: When one wrong rights another: speakers passivize to express the subject as the experiencer in psychological verb use
entry.summary: Authors: Noa Attali, Amnon Attali, Anne Therese Frederiksen DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cllt-2024-0091 Pages: Page range: 461-477

entry.title: When shields and distances are key: a corpus-based study of Slovene bare pronouns in negated clauses
entry.summary: Authors: Kristina Gregorčič DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cllt-2024-0100 Pages: Page range: 479-530

entry.title: On the learnability of aspectual usage
entry.summary: Authors: Dagmar Divjak, Petar Milin, Maciej Borowski DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cllt-2023-0117 Pages: Page range: 531-561
